prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mercedes-Benz OM617.950 3.0L inline-5 turbo-diesel (engine code: OM617.950) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold featuring individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from Jenvey Dynamics (part #JD-ITB-45), paired with a Garrett GT2260V turbocharger (part #743347-0002) for 35 psi boost, supported by a custom 4-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system from Vibrant Performance (part #16814).

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Quaife ATB differential (part #QDF7Z) in the rear axle, upgraded half-shafts from GKN Driveline (part #GKN-716K-HS), and a custom 5-speed manual transmission conversion using a ZF S5-42 gearbox (part #1315 240 011) with a Sachs Performance clutch (part #3000 951 030).

Custom ECU tuning via a standalone Motec M150 ECU (part #M150-0001) with a bespoke calibration for the OM617.950, integrating a dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump setup (part #0 580 254 950) and 1,000cc/min Siemens Deka 80lb injectors (part #8034210060), paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system from MagnaFlow (part #16670) with a straight-pipe design and a Borla Pro XS muffler (part #40863).
estetica: Custom off-road body kit from Rally Raid Products, including a reinforced steel front bumper with integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch (part #103274) and a rear swing-out tire carrier with dual jerry can mounts (part #RRP-716K-SOC).

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SRD front seats (part #391.00.00) mounted on custom aluminum seat sliders from Sparco (part #01857NR), paired with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (part #110400121) and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay from AIM Sportline (part #AIM-716K-DASH).

Exterior livery featuring a custom vinyl wrap from 3M (color: Gloss Military Green, part #1080-G124) with matte black accents on the fender flares, roof, and hood, paired with a set of Method MR701 wheels (part #MR701-1797-17) in a 17x9 +12 offset, wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 tires (part #35/12.50R17).
